rag_rules: Place AGREE assumptions in component type scopes when they refer to ports; use implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Generate AGREE contracts inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks with valid AADL scope and visible identifiers.
generic_rules: Use visible identifiers and AADL data types in AGREE expressions; avoid invented constraints or property references.
Write assumptions and guarantees that relate visible inputs to outputs or constants in component type contracts.
Ensure AGREE expressions match the actual data types of AADL ports and features.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Constants and equations in AGREE should use valid AADL types and visible identifiers.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type annexes.
Do not assume numeric ranges or properties not explicitly stated in the requirement or model.
irrelevant_topics: AADL package references and qualified identifiers
Model fusion and insertion location decisions
